title: Three Things Clients Pay Thousands For
meta: Vertical 9:16 reel, ~31s. Featured brand: Vuori. Inspired by Tim Koda (DTWeMYRjOpq). Full editor brief: visual, Masonry generation, supers, edit, transitions, SFX.
concept: A build-it-in-Masonry creator-money reel demoed on Vuori. The talking creator (generated in Masonry) lays out the three skills brands pay thousands for: consistency (the same Vuori subject a hundred times with no drift), prompt structure (a reusable medium-subject-environment framework), and speed (batch outputs and an automated pipeline). The whole thing is shot in a clean airport-travel setting and every frame, including the creator, is generated in Masonry.
audio: Confident, driving electronic track with a hard beat. Talking-creator VO plus bold red-accent keyword supers (3 things). Cut to the beat; whooshes on the section turns.

beats.vo: You cannot make money with AI until you master three things.
beats.super: Bold condensed caps, red accent; a big '3' slams in top-right.
beats.visual: Creator in a relaxed Vuori hoodie and headphones at a bright modern airport, talking to camera with energy.
beats.masonry: Generate the creator and the setting in Masonry: prompt 'confident creator, Vuori hoodie, modern airport, natural daylight, 9:16.' Fully generated host and location.
beats.edit: Punchy talking-head, quick 3% push-in. The '3' hits on the downbeat.
beats.sfx: Track drops; a deep impact on the '3'.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 0-2: 'CAN'T MONEY / MASTER / 3 THINGS' hook.

beats.vo: First: consistency. The same subject, a hundred times, no variation.
beats.super: '1.' large red numeral, 'consistency' bold beneath; lower-third lockup.
beats.visual: Creator gestures; a Masonry grid of the same Vuori model rendered identically across a hundred tiles fills behind her.
beats.masonry: Skill 1, consistency: in Masonry load the Vuori product and lock the model with seed-lock, then generate the same subject 100 times. Product, character and brand stay identical. Clients pay for reliability.
beats.edit: Cut to the consistency grid, fast push-out to reveal the full hundred tiles.
beats.sfx: A 'populate' multi-click as the grid fills.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 3-6: '1 subject / every / consistency' grid.

beats.vo: Same joggers, same model, every single shot.
beats.super: Lower-third, white on a soft scrim.
beats.visual: Three quick Vuori product cuts (Ponto joggers, Sunday hoodie) on the same model in different poses, all clearly the same person.
beats.masonry: Stay in the same Masonry session: prompt new poses and shots of the Ponto jogger and Sunday hoodie. The seed-locked model carries across every frame, so the catalog reads as one shoot.
beats.edit: Three fast product cuts, micro push-ins.

beats.vo: Second: prompt structure. Stop random prompting.
beats.super: 'SECOND' huge editorial caps fills the frame, then 'prompting' resolves.
beats.visual: Bold typography card, then back to the creator mid-explanation.
beats.masonry: Skill 2, prompt structure: this is where you build a reusable Masonry prompt template instead of one-off prompts.
beats.edit: Cut to the big-type card, then back to the creator. Kinetic type.

beats.vo: Medium, subject, environment. A framework you reuse every time.
beats.super: Framework laid out as a clean stacked list, mono, like a spec sheet.
beats.visual: A 'Crafting Effective Prompts' spec card: MEDIUM, SUBJECT, ENVIRONMENT, with the Vuori subject filled in.
beats.masonry: Build the framework in Masonry as a saved prompt template: MEDIUM (editorial photo), SUBJECT (the Vuori model + product), ENVIRONMENT (the set). Reuse it for repeatable, scalable quality.
beats.edit: Static spec card, line-by-line reveal of the three fields.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 12-14: 'CRAFTING EFFECTIVE PROMPTS / MEDIUM SUBJECT ENVIRONMENT'.

beats.vo: One template, every output, infinite variation, still on brand.
beats.super: 'output' then 'variation' snap in over a generation grid.
beats.visual: A Masonry grid spins out many on-brand Vuori variations from the one template.
beats.masonry: Run the saved template in Masonry to batch many outputs at once: same framework, controlled variation, every result on the Vuori brand.
beats.edit: Grid of variations cascading in, quick zoom punches.

beats.vo: Third: speed. Manual work does not scale, automated workflows do.
beats.super: 'THIRD' big caps, then 'speed' with a fast motion-blur entrance.
beats.visual: Creator moving briskly through the airport, energy and pace; quick whip motion.
beats.masonry: Skill 3, speed: in Masonry the saved template plus batch generation replaces manual work. The pipeline does the volume.
beats.edit: Speed-ramp on the walk; fast cuts accelerating.
beats.sfx: Riser building; whoosh on each whip.

beats.vo: Fifty assets in an hour, not a week. Fast execution wins clients.
beats.super: Bold counter-style super; numbers feel kinetic.
beats.visual: A Masonry export view: dozens of finished Vuori assets rendering and stacking fast.
beats.masonry: Show the Masonry output queue: batch-export dozens of finished Vuori assets at once. This is the speed that wins the client.
beats.edit: Fast montage of assets stacking; push-out to the full queue.

beats.vo: Creativity plus Masonry is the whole pipeline. Comment MASTER for the system.
beats.super: Close line builds, then the Vuori plus Masonry end card; 'MASTER' in the brand accent.
beats.visual: Creator confident to camera, then the Vuori plus Masonry end card.
beats.masonry: Close on a hero Masonry generation of the creator, then the Vuori plus Masonry end card. Consistency, framework, speed: the full pipeline lives in Masonry.
beats.edit: Settle on the creator, clean cut to the end card.
beats.transition: Final hard cut to the end card; hold.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 27-30: 'creativity / AI / get / pipeline' CTA close.

notes: Editor workflow: (1) Load Vuori products (Ponto Performance jogger, Sunday hoodie, Kore short) into the Masonry product library and set the coastal brand kit. (2) Generate the creator and airport setting once; demo the three skills as Masonry features: seed-lock for the consistency grid, a saved medium-subject-environment template for prompt structure, and batch export for speed. (3) Edit per beat following the Super style, Edit / Motion, Transition and SFX direction; talking-creator VO plus bold red-accent keyword supers. Vuori is a stand-in demo brand: swap in the real client. No media generated yet, generation is gated on separate approval per project policy.
